modules.title: Introduction to Computer Networks & Physical Layer
topics: Switching Techniques: Circuit, Packet and Message Switching
Physical Layer: Transmission Media (Guided and Unguided)

modules.title: Data Link Layer & Medium Access Control
topics: Flow Control Protocols: Stop-and-Wait, Sliding Window
Medium Access Control (MAC) Sublayer: Static vs Dynamic channel allocation

modules.title: Network Devices & LAN Standards
topics: IEEE 802 Standards: IEEE 802.3 (Ethernet), IEEE 802.4 (Token Bus), IEEE 802.5 (Token Ring)
Network interconnection devices: Hubs, Switches, Bridges, Routers, and Gateways

modules.title: Network Layer & Routing Protocols
topics: IP Addressing: Classful IP Addressing, Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR)
Routing Algorithms: Shortest Path Routing, Distance Vector Routing (DVR), Link State Routing
Internet Control Protocols: ARP, RARP, ICMP

modules.title: Transport Layer & Application Layer
topics: Connection establishment and release (Three-way and Four-way handshakes)
Application Layer: Domain Name System (DNS), Email Architecture and Formats
